**A Little Incident**  
At the zoo entrance, I met a Taiwanese family who wanted to take photos, so I helped them take pictures. The next day at the airport, I ran into them again and took another photo with the airplane. The younger brother called me the "photo brother" XD.
translations.**小插曲**\n搭路面電車遇到可愛的熊本阿公阿嬤；指著免稅品的透明袋子裡的日清:
**A Little Episode**  
On the streetcar, I met a cute elderly couple from Kumamoto. They pointed at the transparent bag of tax-free Nissin instant noodles and said, "So good, ne~." I replied, "Good! Good@" Then I took out a Kumamon daifuku I just bought and said to grandma, "Kawaii ne~." She gave a thumbs up and said, "Kawaii, arigato." I then said, "私は台湾人です" (I am Taiwanese). Grandma seemed to greet me or say something (my Japanese is too poor to understand, but I caught something about energy). I responded politely. When I got off, I also said goodbye to the elderly couple.

translations.- Numbered ticket = When boarding, there:
- Numbered ticket = When boarding, there is a small machine at the door to take a ticket (similar to taking a numbered queue ticket).

- Some flat fare routes may not use numbered tickets.

- If you pay with an electronic card (Suica), you don't need to take a numbered ticket, but be careful that the balance cannot go negative (**different from Taiwan**).

- Buses and trams do not give change, but you can first exchange money using the coin changer on the vehicle (near the driver’s payment area).

- Mostly board from the back, exit from the front.

- Japanese buses wait for passengers and only depart after everyone is seated or has gotten off; so just stand up when the bus reaches your stop, no need to push forward before the stop (**different from Taiwan**).

- When getting off the bus, check the ticket number in your hand against the corresponding fare to pay:

- Price: $8,157, $2,039/night

- Transportation: From JR Kumamoto Station, transfer to the Hōhi Main Line and then take the tram to get off at Shimin Taiikukan-mae Station. **The return trip to the airport is also very convenient, with direct airport buses available right outside to Kumamoto Airport.**
translations.- Raw cola, peach water, FamilyMart's fr:
- Raw cola, peach water, FamilyMart's fruit juice drinks, and Akiya plum wine—delicious!

- Japanese professional baseball is worth watching! When buying tickets, make sure to get a whole row empty or seats by the aisle, and choose the cheaper seats.

- JR Pass does not always save money, but it really did in Kyushu! At least saved over 1,000 TWD.

- Solo travel also brought many interesting experiences; for example, helping a Japanese family get souvenirs in Mihara City, a kind foreign sister voluntarily taking photos, a Taiwanese family on the boat tour, a TSMC senior who walked with me around Aso, helping a family take photos in Kumamoto and then meeting them again at the airport to take more photos… and so on.

- Kumamon, the Kumamoto mascot, can be found all over Kyushu (not just in Kumamoto).

- The entire Kyushu region feels very spacious with few people around. Famous restaurants and attractions rarely have queues, making it very comfortable.

- My Japanese has improved a bit; I can understand numbers (though I still use Google Translate to confirm pronunciation), and I can understand whether I need a plastic bag. I also know imperative phrases like "checkout," "this one," "that's all," "cash," "credit card," and "tax-free" (XXX お願いします).

- Travelogue Completed!
translations.- This time, the accommodation was disap:
- This time, the accommodation was disappointing:  
  When booking hotels in Japan, it's important to check reviews carefully. It's best to read the low-rated reviews to see if you can accept the issues mentioned. Also, use street view to check the actual surroundings and accessibility.

- This time, I spent too many days in Kumamoto—2 days would have been enough. The extra days could have been spent in Oita. Also, Fukuoka is actually much closer to Kumamoto than to Nagasaki.

  In the past, I would find accommodation first and then look for attractions. Since Kyushu is vast, it's better to choose the places you want to visit first and then arrange accommodation. This way, you can visit more attractions.

- Accommodation options, prices, and quality in Fukuoka are much better than in Kumamoto.

- This time I missed the Yufuin festival (I went to Nagasaki that day):  
  Next time, check if there is a festival on your travel dates. Everyone recommends the festival; it’s a must-visit.

- JR Pass can be used on Shinkansen, but the "Nozomi" and "Mizuho" trains are not allowed; extra fare is required if taken.

- Solo travel combined with language barriers can be quite lonely, but most of the time it's about quietly enjoying solitude.

- Solo travel accommodations are relatively more expensive.

- This time, I still rushed through the sights. I should have slowed down to enjoy the moment and find good food; especially in Japan, famous restaurants are often closed outside meal times.

- The sun in Kyushu is still strong this season, so make sure to use sun protection.

- North Nagasaki is more ordinary (Dutch, Chinatown), while South Nagasaki and the night views are more distinctive.

So, I went on trips with friends to "[[Travelogue] 2023 Kyoto-Osaka-Kobe & 🇯🇵 First Landing](../76d66c2e34af/)" and with colleagues to "[[Travelogue] 2023 Tokyo & 🇯🇵 Second Landing](../9da2c51fa4f2/)". translations.一來就看到外面巨大的福岡鋼彈。\n\n: Right upon arrival, I saw the huge Gundam statue outside in Fukuoka.
translations.一到熊本就看到巨大的熊本熊，先轉 JR & 地鐵到飯店寄放行李(市立體育館前站): Upon arriving in Kumamoto, I immediately saw the huge Kumamon mascot. First, I took the JR and subway to the hotel to drop off my luggage (Shiritsu Taiikukan-mae Station).
translations.一日福岡步行，出飯店後先走到附近的住吉神社。\n\n: A day walking in Fukuoka: after leaving the hotel, I first walked to the nearby Sumiyoshi Shrine.
translations.一早一樣來到通町筋，先去第一天沒去到的熊本稻禾神社\n\n: Early in the morning, I arrived at Torichōsuji again and first visited Kumamoto Inari Shrine, which I missed on the first day.
translations.一早先 Chekout 走到飯店附近的藥院晃晃\n\n: Checked out early in the morning and took a stroll around Yakuin near the hotel.
translations.一早出門走到公車站搭往阿蘇站的客運；等車又遇熊本熊。\n\n: Early in the morning, I walked to the bus stop to take the bus to Aso Station; while waiting, I saw Kumamon again.
translations.一早同樣先到博多站，搭乘 JR 往門司港，再回來小倉城。\n\n: Early in the morning, I also went to Hakata Station first, took the JR train to Mojiko, and then returned to Kokura Castle.
translations.一早從床外看福岡市區的景觀。\n\n: View of Fukuoka city from outside the bed early in the morning.
translations.一樣從太宰府站先回到二日市再轉搭往博多方向的列車，在 大橋（福岡）下車，出站往左: Starting from Dazaifu Station, take the train back to Futsukaichi, then transfer to a train bound for Hakata. Get off at Ohashi (Fukuoka), exit the station, and go to the left platform to find the Lalaport direct bus. Hop on, and it's just one stop to Fukuoka Lalaport.
translations.一樣把總結、檢討寫在前面，在自由行社團看到一段話很喜歡：「自由行就是不斷地繳學費: Write the summary and review first as usual. I really like a quote I saw in a solo travel group: "Solo travel is constantly paying tuition (spending time or money) to learn; the more experience you gain, the fewer pitfalls you fall into."
translations.一路上山，會先經過草千里再到山上總站，從山上總站再換一次公車約 10 分鐘就會到: On the way up the mountain, you will first pass Kusasenri before reaching the mountain terminal. From the mountain terminal, transfer to another bus for about 10 minutes to reach the volcanic crater at the top.
translations.一路上比較特別的是進阿蘇火山範圍時，車上會介紹阿蘇火山然後播放當地的山歌要你一起: A unique experience was when entering the Aso Volcano area; the bus provided an introduction to the volcano and played local mountain songs, inviting passengers to imagine strolling through the Aso volcanic grasslands.
translations.一路上聊得太開心走下來後，沒仔細看公車方向，要發車了趕快上車結果又被載上來，只好: We were having such a great conversation along the way that I didn't pay attention to the bus direction. When it was about to depart, I hurriedly got on, only to be taken back up again. So, I had to walk the route once more XD
translations.一路再從下通走到上通回到通町筋，途中順便去唐吉軻德採購(這間的免稅櫃台在二樓結帳: Walk all the way from Shimo-Tori to Kami-Tori and back to Tsuromachi-suji. Along the way, stop by Don Quijote for shopping (the tax-free counter for this store is on the second floor at checkout).
translations.一路再走回通町筋站，這邊就是上通商店街與熊本本地的鶴屋百貨，百貨東棟一樓就是前幾: Walk back to Tōrimachi-suji Station. Here is Kamitori Shopping Street and the local Kumamoto Tsuruya Department Store. The east building's first floor of the department store is the Kumamon Square (Kumamon Manager’s Office), which was fully renovated just a few months ago.
translations.一路到出境審查幾乎都沒人，安全檢查也你一人獨享。\n\n: There was almost no one until the exit inspection, and I had the security check all to myself.
translations.一路往哥拉巴園走，還有經過孔廟ＸＤ\n\n: Walking all the way to Glover Garden, also passed by the Confucius Shrine XD
translations.一路往後面走去加藤神社(蠻遠的大概要走 20 分鐘，有山坡路。)\n\n: Walk all the way to Kato Shrine (it's quite far, about a 20-minute walk with uphill paths).
translations.一路與前面抱團的台灣家族的爸爸閒聊，最後還獲得一張名片。\n\n: I chatted along the way with the dad from the Taiwanese family traveling together ahead of me, and in the end, I even got one of his business cards.
translations.上天守閣之後可以看到一路走來的天空步道。\n\n: After reaching the main keep, you can see the skywalk that stretches along the path you took.
translations.下午 16:40 的班機，有很充裕的時間慢慢起床、慢慢出門。\n\n: The flight at 16:40 allows plenty of time to wake up and leave slowly.
translations.下山的途中就會經過大浦天主教教堂，沒進去，拍個照就離開了。\n\n: On the way down the mountain, I passed by Ōura Catholic Church. I didn't go inside, just took some photos and left.
translations.下纜車後，還有另一個遊山看景的纜車可以搭，但我沒嘗試，所以直接一路往觀景台方向走: After getting off the cable car, there is another scenic cable car available, but I didn't try it and walked straight toward the observation deck.
translations.下船後沒找到免費接駁車位子，還排錯隊排到其他的(非西鐵套票)接駁車被拒絕搭乘；要: After getting off the ship, I couldn't find the free shuttle bus spot and mistakenly lined up for a different (non-Nishitetsu pass) shuttle, so I was denied boarding. It's better to study the map's boarding point (Kawaryu Funaba (Okinobata)) or just ask directly for faster guidance.
translations.下車就看手上的整理券號碼跟對應的車資支付：\n: Get off the bus and check the ticket number in your hand against the corresponding fare to pay:
translations.下車後對面就是淵神神社，直接往上走穿過幼兒園之後就是長崎纜車(淵神社駅)，因為沒: After getting off, Fuchigami Shrine is right across the street. Just walk straight up and pass through the kindergarten to reach the Nagasaki Ropeway (Fuchigami Shrine Station). Since I didn't plan to stay out late, I bought a round-trip ticket (cheaper). However, if you stay too late, the ropeway will stop running, and you'll have to take a bus back.
translations.下飛機的時候發現前面的人帶了一頂安全帽，是騎機車來坐飛機嗎 🤣\n\n: When getting off the plane, I noticed the person in front of me was carrying a helmet. Did they ride a scooter to catch the flight? 🤣
translations.不得不說巨蛋的視覺效果(離球場很近)、整個大型的螢幕動畫顯示都很好。\n\n: I have to say the dome's visual effects (being very close to the field) and the large screen animations are excellent.
translations.不過也還好沒買那班，從博多站內走到新幹線往鹿耳島(經熊本)的月台，大概就要 10: Fortunately, I didn't buy that train ticket. It takes about 10 minutes to walk inside Hakata Station to the Shinkansen platform heading to Kagoshima (via Kumamoto). The route is a bit roundabout and far, so the timing would have been too tight.
translations.不過啦啦隊的部分，台灣還是比日本豐富的。\n\n: However, when it comes to cheerleading, Taiwan still has more variety than Japan.
translations.中洲屋台就是這一側的路邊食堂，人聲鼎沸；有拉麵、關東煮、燒烤，沒有特別吸引我，就: Nakasu Yatai refers to the roadside food stalls on this side, bustling with people; they offer ramen, oden, and grilled skewers. Nothing particularly attracted me, so I didn't go in to eat.
translations.中間會經過一家冰店，賣水果冰的，可以買一個消消暑；船夫也會發給每個人冰袋降降溫(: Along the way, there is an ice shop selling fruit ice, where you can buy one to cool down; the boatman also gives each person an ice pack to help cool off (very thoughtful).
translations.中間有一節車廂有展示太宰府的文物跟可以寫明信片，可以去看看。\n\n: There is a train car displaying Dazaifu artifacts and a place to write postcards. You can check it out.
translations.主場獲勝會在大巨蛋內放煙火，很酷！！\n\n: The home team’s victory fireworks inside the Dome were really cool!!
translations.九州 10 日自由行 福岡、長崎、熊本 走馬看花紀錄\n\n: 10-Day Kyushu Independent Travel: A Quick Tour of Fukuoka, Nagasaki, and Kumamoto
translations.九州(不只熊本)到處都有熊本熊部長的蹤跡\n: Kumamon, the Kumamoto mascot, can be found all over Kyushu (not just in Kumamoto).
translations.也順手買明天早上的早餐(哈密瓜麵包＋果汁)，全家的這款果肉果汁(哈密瓜、草莓…): Also picked up breakfast for tomorrow morning (melon bread + juice). FamilyMart’s fruit juice with pulp (melon, strawberry, etc.) is really delicious. I almost always buy it when I see it. The juice contains sweet fruit pulp and tastes great.
translations.交通：JR 熊本站出來改搭豐肥本線在搭路面電車出來就到了(市立體育館前站)， *: Transportation: From JR Kumamoto Station, transfer to the Hōhi Main Line and then take the tram to get off at Shimin Taiikukan-mae Station. **The return trip to the airport is also very convenient, with direct airport buses available right outside to Kumamoto Airport.**
translations.交通：從博多站出發，可以搭地鐵七隈線到渡邊通站或搭公車走 5 分鐘到達\n: Transportation: From Hakata Station, you can take the Nanakuma Subway Line to Watanabe-dori Station or take a bus and walk for 5 minutes to reach the destination.
translations.人不算多，時間快到稍微排一下隊就上車了，看大家都有上；不過應該是山路安全考量，沒: There weren’t many people, and as the time approached, we queued briefly before boarding. Everyone seemed to get on; however, probably for safety on the mountain road, there were no standing spots. Also, those prone to motion sickness should take medication.
translations.人很多(大概坐滿 7 成)，但是現場買還有票。\n\n: It was crowded (about 70% full), but there were still tickets available for purchase on-site.
translations.今天才發現飯店的販賣機居然有賣罐裝生可樂，我在三大超商都沒找到。\n\n: I just found out today that the hotel vending machine sells canned draft cola, which I couldn't find at the three major convenience stores.
translations.以上就是九州 10 日獨旅自由行的整個紀錄體驗，總結/Retro 已寫在前面，感: This concludes the entire record and experience of my 10-day solo trip to Kyushu. The summary/retro is written above. Thank you for reading.
translations.休息片刻後下午沒什麼地方去了，就隨便找地圖上的點去晃晃。\n\n: After a short break, there weren't many places to go in the afternoon, so I just randomly picked spots on the map to wander around.
translations.但因為塔蓋在城市的最外側靠海的地方，上面景色普普；不確定晚上夜景如何。\n\n: However, since the tower is located on the outer edge of the city near the sea, the view from the top is so-so; not sure how the night view is.
translations.位子很大很舒服，靠窗可以看風景。\n\n: The seat is spacious and comfortable, with a window view of the scenery.
translations.個人覺得櫻町購物中心比鶴屋百貨新、好逛。\n\n: I personally think Sakura Town Shopping Center is newer and more enjoyable to shop at than Tsuruya Department Store.
translations.候機室、免稅店都不大，但很新並且都有 USB 充電插座；前面說的觀景平台這邊可以: The waiting lounge and duty-free shops are small but new, and all have USB charging ports; the observation deck mentioned earlier offers a view (those people on the 2nd floor are there).
translations.候車的時候發現九州的火車都好有特色！！\n\n: While waiting for the train, I noticed that trains in Kyushu all have unique features!!
translations.值得一提的是飯店，以往其實不會特別看評價；就看差不多 3 顆星以上的就好；這間的: It’s worth mentioning the hotel. In the past, I didn’t pay much attention to reviews; I just chose ones with around 3 stars or higher. This hotel had poor soundproofing, and the entire floor was filled with elementary school graduation trips. For two days straight, there were loud door slams in the mornings and evenings, which was very disturbing.
translations.價格也很不美麗，不如都住福岡，同樣價格在福岡直升 APA 了。\n\n: The price is also quite high; it’s better to stay in Fukuoka. For the same price, you can directly stay at APA in Fukuoka.
translations.先回飯店放買的伴手禮＋休息片刻後出發前往福岡塔＋看棒球賽。\n\n: First, return to the hotel to drop off the souvenirs and rest for a while, then head to Fukuoka Tower and watch a baseball game.
translations.先走路到熊本縣本廳前，找魯夫銅像。\n\n: First, walk to the front of Kumamoto Prefectural Office to find the Luffy statue.
translations.先選擇語言、先選擇語言、先選擇語言 （不然插入票卡後不能改，要退出重來）\n: First select the language, first select the language, first select the language (otherwise, you cannot change it after inserting the ticket card and must exit and start over)
translations.入園哥拉巴園走馬看花，建築風格、內部裝飾；很像淡水紅毛城(因為同樣都是荷蘭人建立: Entering Glover Garden for a quick tour, the architectural style and interior decorations closely resemble Tamsui's Fort San Domingo (both were built by the Dutch).
translations.公車電車不找零，但可以先在車上的對幣機換錢(同樣在司機投錢那邊)\n: Buses and trams do not give change, but you can first exchange money using the coin changer on the vehicle (located near the driver’s payment area).
translations.再搭公車+走路到健軍神社；小神社，去的時候快關門了幾乎沒人。\n\n: Then took the bus plus walked to Kengun Shrine; a small shrine, almost empty as it was close to closing time.
translations.再次經過博多運河城前往櫛田神社。\n\n: Passing through Canal City Hakata again to head towards Kushida Shrine.
translations.再次遇到誤點，這次是 JR (信號故障)；大概延誤快一小時才到博多(已累攤)，司: Encountered a delay again, this time with JR (signal failure); it was delayed nearly an hour before arriving at Hakata (already exhausted). The driver drove fast and it felt quite shaky.
translations.出來後旁邊有一條小小的表參道商店街，可以買些吃的稍作休息。\n\n: After exiting, there is a small Omotesando shopping street nearby where you can buy some food and take a short break.
translations.出機場後可以看到一個指示牌，告知要去的方向＆在哪個站牌等車；除了到博多也能到其他: After exiting the airport, you can see a sign indicating the direction to go and which bus stop to wait at. Besides Hakata, buses also go to other destinations. You can refer to [this article](https://carolblogtw.com/fukuoka-airport/){:target="_blank"} or the [official website](https://www.fukuoka-airport.jp/tw/access/bus.html){:target="_blank"}. If you are going to a distant place, make sure to check the bus schedules in advance.
translations.出福岡塔後慢慢走到上一站就是 福岡 PayPay 棒球場，是海的味道。\n\n: After leaving Fukuoka Tower, slowly walk to the previous stop, which is Fukuoka PayPay Baseball Stadium, where you can feel the scent of the sea.
translations.出站右手邊就是全球唯一的五角(日文合格)碗一蘭拉麵。\n\n: Exit the station and on the right is the world’s only pentagon-shaped (Japanese 合格) bowl Ichiran Ramen.
translations.出站同樣走人工剪票，站員會撕掉福岡往柳川站的票。\n\n: Exit also uses manual ticket inspection; the staff will tear off the ticket from Fukuoka to Yanagawa Station.
translations.出站往前走就是門司港，平日來完全沒人；剛好遇到藍翼門司吊橋要放下。\n\n: Exit the station and walk straight ahead to reach Mojiko. On a weekday, there was no one around; just in time to see the Blue Wing Mojiko Bridge lowering.
translations.出站後往長崎路面電車方向搭乘。\n\n: After exiting the station, head towards the Nagasaki tram direction to board.
translations.出站後會看到穿著白色背心的工作人員(如果沒有旁邊有服務中心可以問) 會給你地圖+: After exiting the station, you will see staff wearing white vests (if not, there is a service center nearby where you can ask). They will give you a map, return route, and timetable, and directly guide you to the shuttle bus to the ferry terminal.
translations.出資料館後往前走就是原子彈爆炸點，和平公園。\n\n: After exiting the museum, walk straight ahead to reach the atomic bomb explosion site and Peace Park.
translations.出長崎車站後天氣大好！本來還擔心今天會下雨。\n\n: After leaving Nagasaki Station, the weather was great! I was originally worried it might rain today.
translations.到博多後先去人工櫃檯兌換 JR Pass (出示護照)並預約前往長崎的位子，兌換: After arriving in Hakata, first go to the manned counter to exchange your JR Pass (show your passport) and reserve a seat for the train to Nagasaki. There are many foreigners exchanging JR Passes, and the wait was nearly an hour. It is recommended to go early or exchange in advance.
translations.到山上總站後，這次看清楚 8 號路線公車、8 號路線公車、8 號路線公車，往山下: After arriving at the mountain terminal, this time clearly look for bus route number 8, bus route number 8, bus route number 8, heading downhill to Aso Station; get off at Kusasenri.
translations.到達乘船處等下一班船時剛好遇到前面是台灣人家族旅行，就地與他們抱團，一路閒聊(畢: While waiting for the next boat at the boarding area, I happened to meet a Taiwanese family traveling ahead. We grouped together and chatted along the way (since I was traveling alone and don't speak Japanese XD, I hardly talked to anyone during my Kyushu trip).
translations.到達機捷 A1 台北車站後，一樣選擇預辦登機，直接在北車完成報到＆掛行李，到機場: After arriving at Taoyuan Airport MRT A1 Taipei Main Station, I also chose to check in early. I completed check-in and baggage drop at Taipei Main Station, so at the airport I could go straight to immigration without queuing at the counters. ([For early check-in information, please refer to the official website](https://web.taoyuan-airport.com/ITCI/mobile/index.html){:target="_blank"}).
translations.到阿蘇站的時候，往阿蘇神社(宮地站)的 JR 再三分鐘就要發車了，錯過要再等一小: When I arrived at Aso Station, the JR train to Aso Shrine (Miyaji Station) was leaving in three minutes. If I missed it, I would have to wait another hour. I ran to the platform and then encountered **Aso being a small station without electronic payment**. I had to buy a ticket and hurriedly purchased it from the vending machine before boarding.
translations.到飯店時接近傍晚，晚餐就路上 Lawson 隨便解決，早早睡準備明天去阿蘇火山！: Arrived at the hotel near evening, had a quick dinner from Lawson on the way, and went to bed early to prepare for tomorrow's trip to Mount Aso!
translations.剛好遇到週六廣場有活動，Food Summit 2003，整圈賣吃的，中間架一個: It happened to be a Saturday with an event at the square, Food Summit 2003. There were food stalls all around, and a stage was set up in the middle for a Japanese-style wrestling performance.
translations.剛好遇到隔壁的台積電大哥一樣是獨旅(來出差的XD)，也都是第一次來阿蘇，於是一起: Coincidentally, I met a TSMC guy next door who was also traveling alone (on a business trip XD) and visiting Aso for the first time, so we teamed up to explore the itinerary together.
translations.北長崎普普(荷蘭、中華街)，南長崎跟夜景比較有特色\n: North Nagasaki is more ordinary (Dutch, Chinatown), while South Nagasaki and the night views are more distinctive.
translations.區間車慢慢開回熊本，大概花了 1 小時 45 分才到。\n\n: The local train slowly headed back to Kumamoto, taking about 1 hour and 45 minutes to arrive.
translations.午餐就吃門司港有名的咖哩燒。\n\n: For lunch, I had the famous curry yaki in Mojiko.
translations.博多到長崎有兩段，會先到武雄溫泉再從武雄溫泉換車往長崎；在同一個月台換車，車次時: The trip from Hakata to Nagasaki has two segments. You first go to Takeo Onsen, then transfer to another train to Nagasaki. The transfer is on the same platform, and the schedules are well coordinated. Basically, you just get off and walk across the platform to board the next train.
translations.原本預計去島原市，但路途太遠(單趟 2 小時 45 分)，加上 JR Pass: Originally planned to go to Shimabara City, but the trip was too long (2 hours 45 minutes one way), and the JR Pass had already expired, so buying a long-distance ticket would cost extra. Gave up; Oita and Yufuin were also too far, gave up; South Aso Village, too lazy to go, saved for next time; so just wandered around the city and did some shopping, taking it slow.
translations.原本預計第一晚就去屋台逛逛，因爲太累就改超商隨便吃一吃，早點休息準備明天的行程。: Originally planned to visit the yatai stalls on the first night, but was too tired and ended up grabbing a quick meal at a convenience store to rest early and prepare for tomorrow's itinerary.
translations.原路返回到 買票的地方，去逛湧湧座；裡面有熊本城模型跟一個樂高做的熊本城，很酷。: Return the same way to the ticket counter area and visit Yuyuza; inside there is a model of Kumamoto Castle and a LEGO version of Kumamoto Castle, which is very cool.
translations.原路返回後前往熊本市役所(14 樓有免費展望台)，到加藤神社的路走起來蠻遠的，可: Return the same way and head to Kumamoto City Hall (14th floor has a free observation deck). The walk to Kato Shrine is quite long, so taking a bus is recommended.
translations.去 B1 吃了當地有名的蜂樂饅頭，就是餡料很厚實的車輪餅，有分白豆、紅豆兩種餡，: Went to B1 to try the local famous Hōraku Manjū, a wheel-shaped cake with thick fillings. There are two flavors: white bean and red bean. Those who like sweets will love it. Paired with coffee, it makes a perfect breakfast.
translations.去無印買了衣服跟雜物、松本清補充藥妝(不知為何我的 Visa 在松本清都刷不過，: Went to MUJI to buy clothes and miscellaneous items, and restocked cosmetics and health products at Matsumoto Kiyoshi (for some reason, my Visa card was declined at Matsumoto Kiyoshi, just like in Tokyo before; this time in Kumamoto, it also didn't work, so I had to use cash in yen).
translations.去美食街吃宮崎牛丼飯，要走的時候買了些宵夜回去(咖哩麵包、如水庵大福)。\n\n: Went to the food court to eat Miyazaki beef bowl. On the way back, bought some late-night snacks (curry bread, Josuian daifuku).
translations.去鶴屋百貨的熊本熊周邊店買了些熊本熊(樣式比熊本廣場多)，再去百貨地下街買酒、吃: Went to the Kumamon merchandise store at Tsuruya Department Store and bought some Kumamon items (more styles than Kumamoto Plaza). Then went to the department store basement to buy alcohol and food (dinner + late-night snacks) to eat back at the hotel.
translations.參拜完後回到太宰府站，往回去福岡 Lalaport。\n\n: After the visit, return to Dazaifu Station and head back to Fukuoka Lalaport.
translations.參觀原爆資料館更多的感受是沈浸與反思，場館設計了很多場景(爆炸當時的或讓人沈浸的: Visiting the Atomic Bomb Museum evokes a deep sense of immersion and reflection. The museum features many scenes (from the moment of the explosion or immersive setups), installation art, historical materials, and interviews. These elements allow visitors to fully immerse themselves in the historical atmosphere and contemplate the cruelty and horror of war.
translations.參觀完後就回車站搭車回博多了，乖乖搭 JR，但是小站只有區間車花了一個多小時慢慢: After the visit, I returned to the station and took the train back to Hakata. I obediently took the JR, but since it was a small station with only local trains, it took over an hour to get back slowly.
translations.另外會送兩本 Coupon， **太宰府那本有一張可以兌換免費的梅枝餅** 。\: Additionally, two coupon books will be given, **one from Dazaifu includes a voucher for a free Umegae-mochi**.
translations.可以一路從外面樓梯上到頂樓找到揮手的熊本熊本尊，這棟樓下同時也是熊本客運中心，可: You can take the outdoor stairs all the way to the top floor to find the waving Kumamon mascot. The building also houses the Kumamoto Bus Center on the ground floor, where you can buy tickets on the second floor to travel to other cities.
translations.可以先去下面的 **櫻之馬場 城彩苑(忘了拍照)** 逛逛補充能量，可以在此購買: You can first visit **Sakura-no-Baba Josaien (forgot to take photos)** to stroll around and recharge. You can also buy Kumamoto Castle tickets here. There are fewer people at this spot, whereas buying tickets at the Kumamoto Castle entrance can be crowded with tour groups.
translations.可以在這邊用販賣機買阿蘇火山一日券(大概便宜個幾百日圓)跟拿時刻表，一日券只限時: You can buy the Aso Volcano One-Day Pass here from the vending machine (about a few hundred yen cheaper) and get the timetable. The one-day pass is only valid for boarding and alighting at the three stations listed on the timetable, and you need to take a numbered ticket when boarding; it seems you cannot use it at other stations.
translations.司機會幫忙把行李箱放到客運下方的行李區，下車要記得拿就好。\n\n: The driver will help place your suitcase in the luggage compartment under the bus. Just remember to take it when you get off.
translations.吃到一半還打到台下，有點嚇人，但帶入感很強；後來實在太熱了，吃完就走了，去後面的: Halfway through eating, it accidentally hit someone in the audience, which was a bit scary but very immersive; later, it got too hot, so after finishing, I left and went to the Sakura Town shopping center behind to browse the department store.
translations.吃太快，只記得手羽先好吃，也嘗試了馬肉串燒(熊本馬肉刺身有名，我不敢吃)；老闆娘: Ate too fast, only remember the chicken wings were delicious. Also tried horse meat skewers (Kumamoto is famous for horse sashimi, but I couldn't try it). The owner’s wife was very friendly, but the menu was all in Japanese and the characters were hard to read with translation apps, so I had to guess XD
translations.吃完午餐就去天神一代、天神地下街亂逛，順便買伴手禮小雞餅乾、蛋糕；也去超市買了串: After lunch, I wandered around the Tenjin area and Tenjin Underground Shopping Mall, picking up souvenirs like chick-shaped cookies and cakes. I also visited a supermarket to try the popular Muscat seedless grapes.
translations.吃完拉麵後來個梅枝餅，跟梅子沒太大關係，比較像紅豆烤年糕，要吃現做的皮才會是蘇的: After eating ramen, I had a umebai (plum rice cake). It’s not really related to plums, more like a red bean grilled mochi. You need to eat it fresh for the crispy skin. Delicious!
translations.吃完搭同班 8 號公車往阿蘇站，原路下山。\n\n: After eating, take the same No. 8 bus to Aso Station and descend the mountain the same way.
translations.吃完走出去逛逛草千里(有點擎天岡的味道)，有騎馬體驗活動。\n\n: After eating, we went out to explore Kusasenri (it has a vibe similar to Qingtian Gang). There is also a horseback riding experience available.
translations.吃完飯我用走的回飯店(約 15 分鐘) 最後漫步在熊本街頭，去 Lawson、全: After dinner, I walked back to the hotel (about 15 minutes). Finally, I strolled around the streets of Kumamoto, stopping by Lawson and FamilyMart to buy ice cream and amazake (I originally thought it was sake, but [amazake is not alcohol; it's a nourishing summer drink](https://www.thecan.com.tw/tw/article/detail/1646){:target="_blank"}).
translations.吃完，天還沒黑先漫步道中洲屋台逛逛。\n\n: After eating, I took a stroll along the Nakasu Yatai before it got dark.
translations.吃有名的 おか牛丼飯，人多但位置也很多，出餐快幾乎不用等。\n\n: Tried the famous おか牛丼 (Oka Beef Bowl). It was crowded but had plenty of seats, and the food was served quickly with almost no wait.
translations.吃飽之後大概才 14:30，隨手買一本日語書臨時抱佛腳。\n\n: After eating, it was only about 14:30, so I casually bought a Japanese book to cram at the last minute.
translations.吃飽喝足後繼續走下通商店街往花畑廣場走。\n\n: After eating and drinking, continue walking down Tsusho Shopping Street towards Hanabata Square.
translations.同樣遇到實際誤點，Google Map 顯示已通過的狀況；還好有長崎的教訓與電子: Also encountered an actual delay where Google Maps showed the train had already passed; fortunately, thanks to the experience in Nagasaki and the electronic display, I patiently waited. The train arrived about 10 minutes late.
translations.回到熊本站與大哥告別，期待有緣再見。\n\n: Back at Kumamoto Station, I said goodbye to my big brother, hoping we will meet again.
translations.回博多時時間還早，就去博多運河城、市區晃晃。\n\n: Returning to Hakata early, I went to Hakata Canal City and strolled around the city.
translations.回台灣又在路上看到熊本熊ＸＤ(好像是玉山銀行的新卡活動)。\n\n: Back in Taiwan, I saw Kumamon again on the street XD (seems like a new card campaign by E.SUN Bank).
translations.回櫻町購物中心逛街，再吃一次宮崎牛配熊本產的啤酒；離開時買了一隻熊本熊大福帶回台: Went shopping at Sakura Town Shopping Center, then had Miyazaki beef again paired with beer from Kumamoto; before leaving, bought a Kumamon daifuku to bring back to Taiwan as a souvenir (so cute).
translations.回程又走了一遍上+下通商店街。\n\n: On the way back, I walked through the Kamitori and Shimotori shopping streets again.
translations.回程往北到長崎原爆資料館的途中先到眼鏡橋下車拍照，從正面看水中的倒影真的蠻美的，: On the way back north to the Nagasaki Atomic Bomb Museum, I got off at Megane Bridge to take photos. The reflection in the water from the front view is really beautiful. It's worth a shot if you have time.
translations.回程的飛機比較新，電影有超級瑪利歐兄弟，看完剛好到台灣；位子也沒坐滿，爽爽的一人: The return flight was on a newer plane, and they had the Super Mario Bros. movie. By the time it finished, we arrived in Taiwan. The seats weren't fully occupied, so I enjoyed having an entire row to myself!
translations.回程：9/26 CI 2195 ( [9/26 新開航](https://eve: Return: 9/26 CI 2195 ( [New route on 9/26](https://event.liontravel.com/zh-tw/chinaairlines/index){:target="_blank"} ) 12:30 KMJ -> 13:34 TPE
translations.回飯店休息順便嚐嚐下午買的麝香無籽葡萄嚐嚐，很甜、有點甜過頭。\n\n: Return to the hotel to rest and try the musk seedless grapes bought in the afternoon. They are very sweet, perhaps a bit too sweet.
translations.回飯店休息，自配平板(電視太舊沒有智慧功能)；咖哩麵包酥脆好吃，裡面還有肉餡、大: Returned to the hotel to rest and used my own tablet (the TV was too old and not smart); the curry bread was crispy and delicious, with meat filling inside. The daifuku was good too, but I prefer the ones from [弁才天](../7b8a0563c157/).
translations.回飯店喝酒吃宵夜休息。\n\n: Return to the hotel to drink, have a late-night snack, and rest.
translations.回飯店後第一次掀開窗簾，後面就是水前寺流域；其實風景不錯，晚上聽得到蟲鳴。\n\: After returning to the hotel, I opened the curtains for the first time and saw the Suizenji basin right outside; the view was actually nice, and I could hear insects chirping at night.
translations.因天氣不理想，就沒再往後繞道博物館、加藤神社。\n\n: Due to bad weather, I didn't detour to the museum or Kato Shrine.
translations.因為九州幅員遼闊，這次有買 [JR Pass 北九州鐵路周遊券](https:/: Because Kyushu is vast, I bought the [JR Pass Kitakyushu Rail Pass](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/3494-jr-kyushu-rail-pass?cid=19365&ud1=d78e0b15a08a){:target="_blank"} (5 days), thinking that no matter how much I travel, it would be worth it.
translations.因為時間相當充裕就找了最奢侈的中午出發中午回的時間，包含飛機時間一共 10 天。: Since there was plenty of time, I chose the most luxurious schedule, departing at noon and returning at noon, totaling 10 days including flight time.
translations.因為沒有很餓就沒有去吃的地方了，直接出境到國際線候機室。\n\n: Since I wasn't very hungry, I didn't go to any restaurant and went straight to the international departure lounge.
translations.因為距離當天表演時間 11 點還很早，先去隔壁鶴屋百貨覓食。\n\n: Since it was still early for the 11 o'clock performance, I first went to the neighboring Tsuruya Department Store to find something to eat.
translations.因飛機延誤大約 21:00 才出機場。\n\n: Due to a flight delay, I only left the airport around 21:00.
translations.在動物園門口找到喬巴銅像。\n\n: Found the Chopper statue at the zoo entrance.
translations.在商店街亂逛剛好遇到熊本熊 x 交通安全 的公開活動，獲得一個熊本熊手提袋。\n: While wandering around the shopping street, I happened to come across a public event featuring Kumamon x Traffic Safety and received a Kumamon tote bag.
translations.在天神亂晃，發現野生的熊本熊部長。\n\n: Wandering around Tenjin, I spotted a wild Kumamon, the mascot of Kumamoto.
translations.在廣場隔壁的伴手禮店收藏了熊本城模型，完成我的三大名城搜集任務！\n\n: Next to the plaza, the souvenir shop has a Kumamoto Castle model, completing my collection of the three famous castles!
translations.在日本獨自流浪 10 天了，也開始想家了、想念台灣的美食、台灣的朋友們。\n\n: I have been wandering alone in Japan for 10 days and am starting to feel homesick, missing Taiwan's delicious food and my friends in Taiwan.
translations.在熊本站逛新開的 AMU PLAZA KUMAMOTO 百貨公司(比櫻町購物中心: At Kumamoto Station, I visited the newly opened AMU PLAZA KUMAMOTO department store (larger and more diverse than Sakura-machi Shopping Center) and the nearby Higo Market (selling food).
translations.在美食街隨便吃了晚餐宮崎雞(普通)，整棟逛了一遍後買了些宵夜、熊本產的草莓酒(試: Had a casual dinner of Miyazaki chicken (just average) at the food court. After walking through the entire building, bought some late-night snacks and strawberry wine from Kumamoto (tasted good, planning to bring it back to Taiwan). Returned to the hotel.
translations.在路上又遇到野生熊本熊圍籬ＸＤ熊本真的到處可見熊本熊！\n\n: On the way, I encountered a wild Kumamon fence XD Kumamoto really has Kumamon everywhere!
translations.在路上看到軍曹井蓋(好像是之前的活動)。\n\n: Saw a Sergeant manhole cover on the street (seems like it was from a previous event).
translations.地勤說托運完先不要走，大概在現場等個 5 ~ 10 分鐘，如果行李有問題他們會叫: The ground staff said not to leave immediately after checking in the luggage. Wait on-site for about 5 to 10 minutes. If there is any issue with the luggage, they will call your number to handle it (the airport is small and has no electronic display, so you just have to wait).
translations.地震之後當時的狀況模型。\n\n: Situation model immediately after the earthquake.
translations.塔出來剛好走一圈門司港。\n\n: Just finished climbing the tower and took a walk around Mojiko.
translations.多半後上前下\n: Mostly back up, then forward down
translations.夜景的中洲屋台給人一種煙火氣感。\n\n: The night view of Nakasu yatai gives a lively, festive atmosphere.
translations.大約等到 10:20 才開放報到/托運，之前都搭長榮(可手提兩件)，這次搭華航才: Check-in and baggage drop-off only opened around 10:20. Previously, I flew EVA Air (allowed two carry-ons), but this time flying China Airlines, I found out only one carry-on is allowed, so I quickly compressed my items into one bag on site.
translations.太宰府站也很美，外面的 Lawson 也很有日本的 Fu。\n\n: Dazaifu Station is also very beautiful, and the Lawson outside has a strong Japanese vibe.
translations.好笑的是走到一半發現那班誤點的車來了。。。但也來不及了 Orz\n\n: The funny thing is that halfway through, the delayed train showed up... but it was already too late Orz
translations.如果用電子支付 (Suica) 可以不用抽整理券，但要注意金額不能扣到負 ( *: If you use electronic payment (Suica), you don't need to take a numbered ticket, but be careful that the balance cannot go negative (**different from Taiwan**).
translations.它是 Suntory 跟百事一起推出的，台灣買不到，用做生啤的做法作可樂，氣泡感: It is a product jointly launched by Suntory and Pepsi, not available in Taiwan. Made using the same method as draft beer, this cola has a strong carbonation and is not overly sweet like syrup-based sodas. I usually end up pouring out regular cola because it gets too cloying, but I can finish this draft cola!
translations.安排的時候沒想太多也沒查資料，想說福岡、熊本都沒去過；就抓個一半一半 5天:4天: I didn’t think much or research when planning; I just figured I hadn’t been to Fukuoka or Kumamoto, so I split the trip about half and half—5 days in Fukuoka and 4 days in Kumamoto.
translations.宮地站出來大概要再走 20 分鐘才會到阿蘇神社(直直走就到，但有點遠)。\n\n: After exiting Miyaji Station, it takes about a 20-minute walk to reach Aso Shrine (just walk straight, but it's a bit far).
translations.對外國人可能是蠻特殊的景點，但對華人還好，裡面有賣長崎特色刮包、長皿烏龍、強棒麵: This spot might be quite unique for foreigners, but it's fairly common for Chinese visitors. Inside, they sell Nagasaki specialty gua bao, nagasara udon, tsuyubon noodles, xiaolongbao, and more. However, I wasn't very hungry at the time, so I just walked around and left.
translations.小倉城小小的不大，裏面參觀的項目蠻多的，只是天守閣的景很普通(正面看出去就是那個: Kokura Castle is small and not very big. There are quite a few exhibits inside, but the view from the main keep is quite ordinary (facing the mall).
translations.小小的，不是在附近應該不會特地去。\n\n: It's small, so I probably wouldn't go out of my way unless it's nearby.
translations.小小的，有一半也還在維修中。\n\n: It's small, and half of it is still under renovation.
translations.山上很涼爽、完全不熱，充滿硫磺味，有圖三的疾病要考慮身體狀況。\n\n: The mountain is very cool and not hot at all, filled with the smell of sulfur. If you have the condition shown in picture three, you should consider your health status.
translations.山上總站要再換一次公車，我們懶得在排公車，選擇直接用走的上山(大約 15–20: At the mountain terminal, we needed to transfer buses again, but we were too lazy to wait in line, so we chose to walk up the mountain instead (about 15–20 minutes).
translations.市役所出來再往櫻町購物中心方向走，會經過一個天橋，是一個很好的拍景地點，可以拍熊: After leaving the City Hall, head towards Sakura-machi Shopping Center. You will pass a pedestrian bridge, which is a great spot to take photos of the Kumamoto tram.
translations.廣場裡面賣的周邊反而少、價格也偏高，就沒有在這邊下手。\n\n: There were fewer merchandise items sold inside the plaza, and the prices were relatively high, so I didn't buy anything here.
translations.從市區搭公車前往福岡塔。\n\n: Take a bus from the city center to Fukuoka Tower.
translations.從裡面也能搭電扶梯上去，從三樓的敘敘苑(這家敘敘苑完全沒人)就能找到再網上的電扶: You can also take the escalator from inside. From the third floor's Shusyu-en (which was completely empty), you can find the escalator going up to the rooftop.
translations.忘了拍觀景台的照片，是一座 360 度的塔，可以環繞看整個長崎市區、港口、山的景: Forgot to take a photo of the observation tower. It is a 360-degree tower that offers panoramic views of Nagasaki city, the harbor, and the mountains. There is no entrance fee. You can watch the sun set over the harbor in the west and then enjoy the city night view to the east.
translations.快 11 點時回到熊本熊廣場等待表演，現在不用抽籤，只要在表演前入場都可以，超過: Returned to Kumamon Square around 11 o'clock to wait for the performance. Now there's no need to draw lots; as long as you enter before the show starts, you can get in. After the start time, you can only watch from outside on the monitor. If you have children, you can sit inside.
translations.感謝大哥請吃炸牛肉馬鈴薯餅。\n\n: Thanks, big brother, for treating me to the fried beef and potato cake.
translations.我後來是走去搭公車，回西鐵柳川站。\n\n: I later walked to take the bus back to Nishitetsu Yanagawa Station.
translations.我忘了用西鐵套票送的退換券換，花 150 日圓自己買了一個；看保存期限只有一天，: I forgot to use the exchange voucher that came with the Nishitetsu pass, so I paid 150 yen to buy one myself; since the validity is only one day, I couldn't bring it back to Taiwan.
translations.我是買 熊本城+湧湧座 想說多 50 日圓而已，但去逛了一圈覺得普普，多補充了熊: I bought the Kumamoto Castle + Yuyuza ticket, thinking it was just 50 yen more. After touring, I found it average. It includes extra exhibits inside Kumamoto Castle and earthquake-related artifacts, suitable for photo opportunities and experiences.
translations.我是買五日券，從換的那天開始算五日，進出車站都用有本券(有日期＆金額那張)，劃位: I bought the 5-day pass, which counts from the day of exchange. Use the main pass (with date & amount) to enter and exit stations. The reserved seat ticket only shows your seat location and cannot be used to enter or exit stations. Keep the main pass safe, as you'll need it for all five days. If lost, it's gone!
translations.我要搭乘 8 號路線，10:45 分上山的公車。\n\n: I will take bus route 8, departing for the mountain at 10:45.
translations.抵達桃園機場，回家！\n\n: Arrived at Taoyuan Airport, heading home!
translations.抵達阿蘇站，站外有 [航海王烏索普](https://www.nipponsen: Arriving at Aso Station, there is a [One Piece Usopp](https://www.nipponsensor.net/hotspots/kyushu/kumamoto/16623/){:target="_blank"} statue outside the station for photos (I forgot about it).
translations.按照說明書劃位，總之就是：\n\n: According to the manual for seat reservation, in short:
translations.提領行李的時候，可能因為太早托運；等了一下才來，順便實驗了 Airtag 尋找功: When picking up the luggage, maybe because it was checked in too early, I waited for a while before it arrived. I also tested the Airtag tracking feature, and it alerted me when the luggage got close!
translations.搭乘旅人號到太宰府，經 五條 (2.5 條悟QQ)；有點類似北投到新北投，就一班: Take the Traveler Train to Dazaifu, passing through Gojo (2.5 stops, tough QQ); it's somewhat like the route from Beitou to Xinbeitou, with just one train running back and forth.
translations.搭乘時隔壁坐一組家庭，爸爸媽媽帶兩個小孩出去玩，小孩坐車到一半突然吐，看爸爸一時: Sitting next to me was a family: a dad and mom with two kids going on a trip. One of the kids suddenly vomited halfway through the ride. Seeing that the dad had no tissues and was using a newspaper to clean up, I handed him some tissues and wet wipes.
translations.搭地鐵到博多太繞，直接走路到渡邊通搭公車到博多比較快。\n\n: Taking the subway to Hakata is too roundabout; it's faster to walk to Watanabe-dori and take the bus to Hakata.
translations.放下後可往後走到後面的觀景塔，鳥瞰整個門司港。\n\n: After putting down your belongings, you can walk back to the observation tower behind to get a bird's-eye view of the entire Mojiko area.
translations.放好飯店後搭路上電車前往熊本城(到通町筋站)。\n\n: After checking into the hotel, take the tram to Kumamoto Castle (get off at Tsuromachi-suji Station).
translations.散場的人非常多，但大家不會站太近也都慢慢走，就跟著大家一路走到最近的地下鐵唐人街: There were many people leaving, but no one stood too close and everyone walked slowly. I followed the crowd all the way to the nearest subway station, Chinatown Station, because the bus line seemed very long.
translations.整個九州都很空曠，都沒什麼人，名店吃的、景點幾乎不用排隊，很舒服\n: The entire Kyushu region feels very spacious with few people around. Famous restaurants and attractions rarely have queues, making it very comfortable.
translations.整理券(上面有號碼) = 上車時候門口會有一台小機器可以抽(類似抽號碼牌)\n: Numbered ticket = When boarding, there is a small machine at the door to draw a ticket (similar to taking a numbered queue ticket)
translations.新的是直接規劃成天空步道，照著路線一路走到熊本城。\n\n: The new plan is to follow the Skywalk route all the way to Kumamoto Castle.
translations.日文稍微進步一點，聽得懂數字(雖然還是要先用 Google 翻譯確認沒唸錯)、聽: My Japanese has improved a bit; I can understand numbers (though I still use Google Translate to confirm pronunciation), and I can understand whether I need a plastic bag. I also know imperative phrases like "checkout," "this one," "that's all," "cash," "credit card," and "tax-free" (XXX お願いします).
translations.日本公車會等人，等人坐好才開、等人下車才開；所以到站再站起來就好，不用還沒到站就: Japanese buses will wait for passengers, only departing after everyone is seated or after passengers have gotten off; so just stand up when the bus arrives at your stop, no need to push forward before the stop (**different from Taiwan**).
translations.日本職棒值得一看！買票記得買整排空或是靠走道的位子、便宜的位子就好\n: Japanese professional baseball is worth watching! When buying tickets, make sure to get a whole row empty or seats by the aisle, and go for the cheaper seats.
translations.日落後就能看到整個長崎市區、車站的夜景，很美。\n\n: After sunset, you can see the entire Nagasaki city and station night view, which is very beautiful.
translations.早上先到 福岡（天神）遊客中心買一日套票 ( [福岡天神、藥院或線上購票都可](: In the morning, first go to the Fukuoka (Tenjin) Tourist Center to buy a one-day pass ( [available at Fukuoka Tenjin, Yakuin, or online](http://www.ensen24.jp/kippu/tc/dazaifu-yanagawa/){:target="_blank"} ). You can calculate yourself if it’s cheaper.
translations.早上起來出門直接走到對面的水前寺成趣園。\n\n: In the morning, I went out and walked straight to Suizenji Jojuen Garden across the street.
translations.時間還很久，就一起走回路上的松本清逛逛。(其實也蠻遠的，大概要 10 分鐘)。\: There was still plenty of time, so we walked back together and browsed Matsumoto Kiyoshi on the way. (Actually, it’s quite far, about a 10-minute walk).
translations.時間還很早就亂走，走出去吃 [博多祇園鐵鍋煎餃](https://www.goo: It was still early, so I wandered out to eat at [Hakata Gion Iron Pot Fried Dumplings](https://www.google.com.tw/maps/place/%E5%8D%9A%E5%A4%9A+%E7%A5%87%E5%9C%92+%E9%90%B5%E9%8D%8B%E7%85%8E%E9%A4%83/@33.592549,130.3956236,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x354191c08e1f8ba5:0x2fab929d0965c092!8m2!3d33.5925325!4d130.4140561!16s%2Fg%2F11b6_mwx3l?entry=ttu){:target="_blank"}.
translations.時間還很早就先走去逛天神的百貨 (Parco) 等天黑再回來看夜景。\n\n: It was still early, so I went to shop at Tenjin's department store (Parco) before returning to see the night view after dark.
translations.晚上去新水前寺站的居酒屋吃飯。\n\n: Went to an izakaya near Shin-Suizenji Station for dinner.
translations.晚上發光的鋼彈還是蠻震撼的。\n\n: The Gundam glowing at night is quite impressive.
translations.最一開始考慮 福岡進福岡出，熊本一兩日來回(後面證明這才是對的ＸＤ，熊本景點不多: At first, I considered flying into Fukuoka and out of Fukuoka, with a one- or two-day round trip to Kumamoto (which later proved to be the right choice XD, since Kumamoto doesn’t have many attractions and doesn’t require many days). I found a China Airlines flight arriving in Fukuoka and departing from Kumamoto that was even $1,000 cheaper, so I decided on that flight.
translations.最後主場 4:2 獲得勝利，比中職精彩，投手球速都在 145km 上下，局局有攻: The final home game ended with a 4:2 victory, more exciting than the CPBL. Pitchers’ speeds were around 145 km/h, with offense and defense in every inning, rarely three up three down; yet the pace of the game was fast and felt very smooth.
translations.最後別忘了去兌換免費的寫真照片，從這也能瞭望長崎港的郵輪。\n\n: Finally, don't forget to redeem your free photo, where you can also enjoy a view of the cruise ships at Nagasaki Port.
translations.最後看一眼寧靜的阿蘇。\n\n: A final look at the peaceful Aso.
translations.最後看一眼長崎車站的夜景、買個長崎蛋糕伴手禮(後來發現博多就有賣、保存期限約 1: One last look at Nagasaki Station's night view and buying some Nagasaki castella as souvenirs (later found out they are also sold in Hakata, with a shelf life of about 12 days, so it would have been better to buy them later...). Ready to head back to Hakata.
translations.最後跟這間飯店說再見了，Lobby 有福岡軟銀鷹隊的娃娃、外面有掛 🇹🇼 國旗也: Finally, said goodbye to this hotel. The lobby has Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks dolls, and outside there’s a 🇹🇼 flag hanging, which is quite impressive since next door is a convenience store run by Chinese people, with many Chinese customers.
translations.會先經過阿蘇機場(後天就要來了 Orz)。\n\n: Will first pass through Aso Airport (coming the day after tomorrow Orz).
translations.有一個小的熊本地震募款箱，加藤神社就沒參拜了，改投募款箱。\n\n: There was a small Kumamoto earthquake donation box at Kato Shrine, so I skipped the worship and donated instead.
translations.有一家蠻特別的店叫「BIWAN 美灣」賣台灣的食品(有看到乖乖ＸＤ)，查了一下是: There is a unique shop called "BIWAN 美灣" that sells Taiwanese food (I even saw Kuai Kuai XD). I looked it up and found it is run by [Taiwan's Ayuan Soap](https://spice.kumanichi.com/outing/spices-iine/126872/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有問題現場都有站務人員可以問，本來有一班 15 分鐘後發車的沒位子，只能買 45: There are station staff on site to ask for help. Originally, there was a train departing in 15 minutes with no available seats, so I had to buy a ticket for another train departing 45 minutes later.
translations.有展示博多祇園祭的神轎，很巨大壯觀。\n\n: There was a display of the Hakata Gion Festival mikoshi, which was huge and spectacular.
translations.有旅伴拍照就不是問題了！\n\n: Having a travel companion means no problem with taking photos!
translations.有的路線是一口價可能就不會有整理券\n: Some routes with a flat fare may not have numbered tickets.
translations.有驚無險(想說會不會被罰錢)的來到門司港。\n\n: Arrived at Mojiko safely (was worried about getting fined).
translations.有點板橋林家花園感，裡面整理的很乾淨、水很清澈，有小富士山、出水神社跟很肥的錦鯉: It feels a bit like Banqiao Lin Family Garden. The place is very clean and the water is clear. There is a small Mount Fuji, Izumi Shrine, very fat koi fish, and cats.
translations.有點烏來->雲仙樂園的 Fu。\n\n: A bit of Wulai -> Unzen Amusement Park Fu.
translations.朋友 9 月就找到工作去上班了，一時之間也找不到新旅伴；一個人去不太想要大範圍移: My friend started working in September, so I couldn’t find a new travel companion for a while; I didn’t want to move around too much alone, so I gave up the 🇰🇷 Busan ➡️ 🇯🇵 Fukuoka segment and changed to the 🇯🇵 Fukuoka ➡️ 🇯🇵 Kumamoto route, entering through Fukuoka and returning from Kumamoto.
translations.本來打算去熊本美術館、手工藝館…等等，但週一都沒開！\n\n: Originally planned to visit Kumamoto Art Museum, Handicraft Center, etc., but they are all closed on Mondays!
translations.本來看路程想說可以用走的，但出站就看到有工作人員直接用心引導，所幸就搭乘巴士了。: I originally thought I could walk the route, but as soon as I exited the station, staff were there to guide me attentively, so I decided to take the bus.
translations.本來還擔心我的 [27 寸行李箱](https://tw.eminent.com: I was originally worried that my [27-inch suitcase](https://tw.eminent.com/?route=product/product&product_id=362&color=240&size=27){:target="_blank"} (about 69 x 50 x 29 cm) might not fit on the overhead luggage rack, requiring me to buy a [special oversized baggage ticket, which is mandatory if any dimension exceeds 160 cm](https://www.westjr.co.jp/global/tc/howto/baggage/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來預計要搭的是 2 號直達博多站，但 2 號好像末班還是要再等一個小時(我忘了: Originally planned to take Line 2 direct to Hakata Station, but the last train on Line 2 seemed to require waiting for another hour (I forgot), so I switched to Line 1 to Fukuoka Airport Domestic Terminal (Fukuoka Airport Subway Station), then took the subway to Hakata and transferred to the Nanakuma Line to Watanabe-dori Station.
translations.查了下 Google/Agoda 上的評價明細，覺得心有戚戚焉。\n\n: After checking the detailed reviews on Google/Agoda, I felt a strong sense of empathy.
translations.查公車出客美多走一小段有公車站到稻佐山下纜車搭乘處(淵神社駅)，就漫步到車站等車: Check the bus schedule; it's better to walk a short distance to the bus stop near Mitomo to reach the base cable car station of Inasayama (Fuchinomiya Station), then stroll to the station and wait for the bus.
translations.查資料的時候還找得一個酷網站 — <https://kumataiwanlife: While researching, I also found a cool website — <https://kumataiwanlife.com/>{:target="_blank"} which has the latest news, events, and trivia about Kumamoto in Chinese (for example: [Kumamoto's "OK bandage" is called "LIBATAPE"](https://kumataiwanlife.com/?p=1350){:target="_blank"}) and more.
translations.柳川往太宰府要在二日市車站換乘往太宰府的列車(要到另一個月台)。\n\n: To travel from Yanagawa to Dazaifu, you need to transfer at Nishitetsu Futsukaichi Station to the train bound for Dazaifu (you must go to a different platform).
translations.樓上有 Animate、扭蛋首抽就中五條悟。\n\n: Upstairs has Animate and you can get Gojo Satoru on the first gacha pull.
translations.樓上有 Jump Shop 賣少年 Jump 週刊的相關周邊，有排球少年、航海王: Upstairs, there is a Jump Shop selling merchandise related to Weekly Shonen Jump, including Haikyuu, One Piece, Hunter x Hunter, Jujutsu Kaisen, Chainsaw Man, and more. I bought some Jujutsu Kaisen items.
translations.樓頂有一個很大的花園、可以玩水的水池，有帶小孩可以上去玩。\n\n: There is a large garden on the rooftop and a pool where kids can play if you bring them along.
translations.櫛田神社比較大，也抽了支籤，看到求職「會突然成功」好像對工作又看到了希望呢。\n: Kushida Shrine is relatively large. I also drew a fortune slip and saw that job hunting "will suddenly succeed," which gave me renewed hope for work.
translations.櫻町購物中心出來旁邊就是熊本縣物產館，除了有熊本縣的特產外也有一些熊本熊周邊(例: Right next to Sakura-machi Shopping Center is the Kumamoto Prefecture Product Hall. Besides local specialties from Kumamoto, there are also some Kumamon merchandise (e.g., Kumamon incense burner XD).
translations.水非常乾淨，這個季節綠油油的比較沒那麼美，但相對人也少。\n\n: The water is very clean. The greenery is less vibrant this season, but there are fewer people around.
translations.沒問題後，往國際線出發方向出境；本來想說早早來機場逛，結果機場也沒什麼。\n\n: After clearing security, head towards the international departures area; I originally planned to arrive early to explore the airport, but there wasn’t much to see.
translations.沒特別查，本來以為是什麼「城」或什麼「護城河」之類，結果是百貨公司ＸＤ，真的有「: Without checking specifically, I originally thought it was some kind of "castle" or "moat," but it turned out to be a department store XD. There really is a "moat" and even a water dance show.
translations.沒特別買什麼，就把 Apple Watch 的 Suica 餘額花完，投了兩瓶水: Didn’t buy much, just used up the Suica balance on my Apple Watch and bought two bottles of peach water to bring back to Taiwan.
translations.浮誇顯眼的日式廣告招牌。\n\n: Extravagant and eye-catching Japanese-style advertising signs.
translations.滿 5000 日圓一樣可以退稅，但好像是退到他的 App 還什麼的，有點複雜，而: Tax refund is also available for purchases over 5000 yen, but it seems the refund is credited to their app or something similar, which is a bit complicated. Also, food items are not included.
translations.熊本住宿很難找(不知道是不是都被台積電出差訂走的關係)，選擇少、價格比福岡貴、老: Finding accommodation in Kumamoto was difficult (not sure if it's because TSMC business trips booked most places), with limited options, higher prices than Fukuoka, and older facilities. In the end, I only found this relatively affordable hotel.
translations.熊本到處都是熊本熊….\n\n: Kumamoto is full of Kumamon everywhere...
translations.熊本動物園之前查好像蠻無聊的，就沒特別安排要進去；傍晚來人家也休園了。\n\n: I had checked before and the Kumamoto Zoo seemed quite boring, so I didn’t plan to go in; by the evening, it was already closed.
translations.熊本城天守閣 2023 年已完成修復開放，其他建築仍在維修中(可以看到吊車)。\: Kumamoto Castle's main keep was fully restored and reopened in 2023, while other buildings are still under repair (you can see cranes).
translations.熊本市役所 14 樓可以鳥瞰整個熊本是、熊本城。\n\n: From the 14th floor of Kumamoto City Hall, you can get a bird's-eye view of the entire Kumamoto city and Kumamoto Castle.
translations.熊本熊本尊很萌，動作很大、很有趣。\n\n: Kumamon, the mascot of Kumamoto, is very cute, lively, and fun.
translations.熊本逛到第三天其實挺無聊的，能去的景點早就去完了，只能盡量找一些地方去看看然後買: By the third day in Kumamoto, it actually got quite boring. I had already visited all the main attractions, so I just tried to find some places to explore and buy souvenirs and cosmetics.
translations.獨旅+語言不通其實蠻孤單的，更多時候是自我沉靜享受孤獨\n: Solo travel combined with language barriers can be quite lonely, but most of the time it's about quietly enjoying solitude.
translations.獨旅也遇到很多有趣的事；例如途中幫助了日本家庭獲得三原市的伴手禮、好心的外國姊姊: Solo travel also brought many interesting experiences; for example, helping a Japanese family get souvenirs in Mihara City, a kind foreign sister voluntarily taking photos, a Taiwanese family on the boat tour, a TSMC senior who walked with me around Aso, helping a family take photos in Kumamoto and then meeting them again at the airport to take more photos… and so on.
translations.獨旅找住的比較貴\n: Solo travel accommodations are relatively more expensive.
translations.生可樂、蜜桃水、全家的果汁飲料、秋雅梅酒，好喝！\n: Raw cola, peach water, FamilyMart's fruit juice drinks, and Akiya plum wine—delicious!
translations.發現沒什麼，吃個麥當勞(滿福堡加蛋配冰美式這樣才 $107)就回來拿行李準備搭: Didn't find much, so I just had McDonald's (a McMuffin with egg and iced Americano for only $107) before heading back to get my luggage and catch the JR train to Kumamoto.
translations.皮酥酥脆脆裡面有湯汁，很好吃；因為語言不通，店員阿姨還很可愛比手畫腳比大肚子 2: The crust is crispy and flaky with juicy filling inside, very delicious; because of the language barrier, the shop auntie cutely used hand gestures to show a big belly for 2 portions (1 portion has only 8 pieces, 2 portions with 16 pieces are filling). I didn’t realize it at the time, so I only ordered one portion plus Hakata’s famous mentaiko.
translations.看到這山坡往上拐進去就是加藤神社了，也可以看到第一天從天守閣看後面在維修的地方，: You can see the slope leading up to Kato Shrine. From the castle keep on the first day, you can also see the area under repair in the back, along with many scattered castle walls that need to be restored one by one.
translations.看地圖再往後走有水前寺流域的江津湖公園，順路走去看看；發現 **只是當地人運動的: Check the map and walk further to Ezu Lake Park in the Suizenji River Basin; since it’s on the way, I decided to take a look. I found it was **just a riverside park where locals exercise**, so I took the bus straight back to the hotel (the bus stop was also the starting point).
translations.看完表演接近中午，走下通商店街吃 [勝烈亭 新市街本店](https://map: After watching the show and approaching noon, I walked down the shopping arcade to eat at [勝烈亭 新市街本店](https://maps.app.goo.gl/LFjoSMqAAKokpQ7x7){:target="_blank"}; stepping outside the arcade, the atmosphere instantly shifted from family-friendly to adult-only, with a whole row of free guide bars (the same on the other side at Kumamoto Ginza Street).
translations.真的除了離機場交通方便外沒優點，附近也無超商(要走 10 分鐘以上才有)。\n\: Honestly, aside from convenient access to the airport, there are no advantages. There are no convenience stores nearby (you have to walk more than 10 minutes to find one).
translations.神社不大，一下就參拜完；神社部分也在維修中。\n\n: The shrine is small and can be visited quickly; part of the shrine is also under renovation.
translations.票價快 $1,500 台幣，想想應該買個最便宜的爛座位自己輕鬆看就好。\n\n: The ticket price is nearly 1,500 TWD, so I figured I’d just buy the cheapest seat and watch comfortably on my own.
translations.福岡住宿的選擇、價格、品質都比熊本好太多\n: Accommodation options, prices, and quality in Fukuoka are much better than in Kumamoto.
translations.福岡塔全鏡面設計，從外面看很美，我覺得比晴空塔還美！\n\n: Fukuoka Tower features a full mirrored design, which looks stunning from the outside. I think it's even more beautiful than Tokyo Skytree!
translations.福岡軟銀鷹隊的加油應援傳統，7 局上大家會灌氣球(用手動打氣桿) 然後釋放出去，: The cheering tradition of the Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks involves inflating balloons (using manual pumps) during the top of the 7th inning and then releasing them. As for the trash… no one really cares, but someone eventually cleans it up.
translations.第一站先往南到長崎新地中華街逛逛。\n\n: The first stop is to head south to Nagasaki Shinchi Chinatown for a stroll.
translations.第二張照片的左邊就是要入住的飯店。\n\n: The hotel I will be staying at is on the left side of the second photo.
translations.約莫 13:00 抵達機場，直接出境亂晃。\n\n: Around 13:00, arrived at the airport and wandered around after immigration.
translations.純走馬看花，就沒有走到阿蘇中岳火山口，上來看看就走下山了。\n\n: Just a quick visit, I didn't go down to the Aso Nakadake volcanic crater; I just came up to take a look and then went back down the mountain.
translations.結果被公車誤點雷了，這小站沒有電子看板，Google Map 又寫已離站但又沒看: The bus was delayed, which was frustrating. This small stop had no electronic display, and Google Maps showed the bus had left, but I didn’t see it. After waiting more than 5 minutes, I thought maybe there was no service today. So I quickly checked for other nearby stops with buses to Fuchinomiya Shrine, then walked another 10 minutes to a different stop and took another bus to finally get there.
translations.經過荷蘭坡(就是個斜坡)，然後搭乘電扶梯往上到哥拉巴園 2 號入口，整個地形就是: Passing through Dutch Slope (which is just a slope), then taking the escalator up to Glover Garden Entrance No. 2. The whole terrain is a large hillside facing the sea.
translations.經過這次經驗之後知道就算是日本飯店也還是要看一下評價的….\n\n: After this experience, I realized that even for hotels in Japan, it's still important to check the reviews...
translations.繼續漫步福岡，中午走到 [ハカタミヤチク (日本一宮崎牛専門店 博多みやちく)]: Continuing the stroll in Fukuoka, I walked to [ハカタミヤチク (Japan’s No.1 Miyazaki Beef Specialty Store Hakata Miyachiku)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/FomFZet8BhoBpU4a7){:target="_blank"} at noon to taste Miyazaki beef.
translations.船夫會一路介紹經過的景點、唱唱歌(台灣人多半會聽過，很多老歌)。\n\n: The boatman will introduce the passing sights along the way and sing songs (most Taiwanese people have heard them, many old songs).
translations.花畑廣場，感覺每週六日都有活動，來之前可以查一下，下一週是台灣祭！\n\n: Hanahata Plaza seems to have events every weekend. You can check ahead before visiting. Next week is the Taiwan Festival!
translations.表參道繼續往太宰府走就會經過日本最美之一的星巴克，空間蠻大但人也多，沒有駐足就離: Continuing along Omotesando towards Dazaifu, you will pass one of Japan's most beautiful Starbucks. The space is quite large but also crowded, so I left without stopping.
translations.表演前會先說明秩序規則，例如：不可以拍打熊本熊、拍照不可舉過頭(會擋到後面的)、: Before the performance, the rules are explained, such as: no touching Kumamon, photos should not be taken with the camera raised above the head (to avoid blocking others), faces must be pixelated according to Japanese law, and everyone is welcome to upload to SNS.
translations.表演時刻表可參考熊本 [廣場官方網站](https://www.kumamon-: The performance schedule can be found on the Kumamoto [Square official website](https://www.kumamon-sq.jp/en/){:target="_blank"} (times may vary, but there are usually three shows on Saturdays).
translations.表演時間約 30 分鐘，主持小姊姊會邊幫熊本熊發言(全日文)，流程大概是跟大家打: The performance lasts about 30 minutes. The host, a young lady, speaks on behalf of Kumamon (all in Japanese). The program roughly includes greeting everyone, sharing fun facts about Kumamoto, dancing (to the catchy song above), and saying hi to people from different countries. (There were the most Taiwanese people in this show XD).
translations.裡面有熊本熊部長周邊可以拍照，外面有 Monitor 能看到裡面的狀況。\n\n: Inside, there are Kumamon-themed items for photo opportunities, and outside, a monitor shows the inside view.
translations.要下車的時候，爸爸給了我一個 三原市お土産 (蝦子米餅)。\n\n: When I was about to get off, my dad gave me a souvenir from Mihara City (shrimp rice crackers).
translations.觀景台很大，不怕人多。\n\n: The observation deck is spacious, so it doesn't feel crowded.
translations.買了杯氣泡酒+烤腸坐下來看表演，烤腸不香沒有台灣的好吃。\n\n: Bought a glass of sparkling wine and grilled sausage, sat down to watch the show. The sausage wasn't as flavorful as those in Taiwan.
translations.買了條軟銀鷹的毛巾做為到此一遊的紀念，也一解 [上次去阪神虎甲子園棒球場票售罄不: I bought a SoftBank Hawks towel as a souvenir to mark my visit, also easing the embarrassment of [last time when the Hanshin Tigers Koshien Stadium tickets were sold out and I couldn't get in](../76d66c2e34af/).
translations.買了長崎的刮包吃看看，我覺得還是台灣的好吃！\n\n: I bought a Nagasaki-style gua bao to try, but I still think the ones in Taiwan taste better!
translations.買個宵夜回飯店休息。\n\n: Bought a late-night snack and returned to the hotel to rest.
translations.買完想說先回飯店休息＋放東西。\n\n: After shopping, I decided to return to the hotel first to rest and drop off my things.
translations.買完票後走人工窗口，給站員看票後就能進車站直接搭車(不用劃位)前往柳川。\n\n: After buying the ticket, go to the manned window. Show the ticket to the staff, and you can enter the station and board the train directly (no seat reservation needed) to Yanagawa.
translations.買票的時候遇到阿伯櫃檯，看到外國人語言不通緊張的手在抖；我也跟著緊張ＸＤ；一時腦: When buying tickets, I encountered an older man at the counter who was nervous and trembling because of the language barrier with a foreigner; I got nervous too XD. In a moment of brain fog, I chose a reserved seat in the very last row of the front stand, right in the middle (with people sitting on both sides). It was super awkward going in and out, having to say すみません all the way, and the seat was very small. Surrounded by Japanese people and not knowing any Japanese myself, it was quite embarrassing... I sat upright and seriously watched the entire game.
translations.走完後搭乘路面地鐵到水道町前往熊本熊廣場(昨天來過)。\n\n: After walking, take the tram to Suidōchō and head to Kumamon Square (visited yesterday).
translations.走路到山上廣場，出來就是阿蘇中岳第四火山口。\n\n: Walk to the mountain plaza, and you will arrive at the fourth crater of Aso Nakadake.
translations.趁著難得的空檔再去探索一次日本，原本的計畫是找同樣在待業的朋友一起去 **🇰🇷: Taking advantage of a rare free moment to explore Japan again, the original plan was to go with a friend who was also unemployed on the route **🇰🇷 Busan ➡️ 🇯🇵 Fukuoka ➡️ 🇯🇵 Kumamoto**; traveling from Korea to Kumamoto and back. On the way from Busan to Fukuoka, we could take the [Shin Camellia](https://journey.tw/new-camellia/){:target="_blank"} ferry, sleep for 12 hours, and arrive in Fukuoka—combining commuting and accommodation all in one.
translations.超厚 Jucie 豬排飯，比較特別的是有附他們的酸菜(共用、自己夾、記得用紅色筷: Extra thick Juice pork cutlet rice. What’s special is they serve their own pickled vegetables (shared, self-serve, remember to use the red chopsticks). Other than that, it’s like eating Japanese pork cutlet in Taiwan, with a grinding stick and sesame seeds for making sauce. Rice, tea, soup, and cabbage are all free to refill. I ate two bowls of white rice in one go and felt very satisfied.
translations.趕在 JR Pass 到期最後一天用完。\n\n: Used it up just in time on the last day of the JR Pass validity.
translations.路上(包括原爆資料館)都懸掛很多彩色紙鶴象徵祈求和平。\n\n: Along the way (including the Atomic Bomb Museum), many colorful paper cranes are hung as symbols of praying for peace.
translations.路上又遇野生熊本熊。\n\n: Encountered a wild Kumamon on the road again.
translations.路上看到屋台餐車早上停放的地方，好小巧可愛。\n\n: On the way, I saw the spot where the yatai food carts park in the morning—so small and cute.
translations.路線有一段是之字形，會倒車開，別擔心，沒搭錯！\n\n: There is a zigzag section on the route where the train reverses direction. Don’t worry, you haven’t boarded the wrong one!
translations.路過旁邊的鶴屋百貨一樓也發現一隻心酸打工彈鋼琴的部長。\n\n: Passing by the first floor of Tsuruya Department Store, I also spotted a department head sadly working part-time playing the piano.
translations.車站電子機器劃位，想說有點遠、帶著行李還是劃個位。\n\n: Using the station's electronic machine to reserve a seat, thinking it's a bit far and with luggage, it's better to have a reserved seat.
translations.這個十字路口就是熊本銀座通，前幾天有說到這邊也都是無料案內所。\n\n: This intersection is Kumamoto Ginza Street. A few days ago, I mentioned that there are also many free information centers here.
translations.這季節九州的太陽還是很曬，要做好防曬\n: The sun in Kyushu is still strong this season, so make sure to use sun protection.
translations.這整區不算好逛，蠻無聊的；只有蔦屋書店、無印良品那棟比較好逛，熊本剛下車站就可以: This area is not very enjoyable to walk around and is quite boring; only the Tsutaya Bookstore and the Muji building are worth visiting. When arriving at Kumamoto Station, you can immediately feel that there are many elderly people and few young people. The local Tsuruya Department Store mostly caters to elderly customers, selling mainly women's clothing and household goods, with fewer items for young people.
translations.這樣一份宮崎牛排＋啤酒大約台幣 $650 上下，好吃又便宜！宮崎牛 Juice: This Miyazaki beef steak with beer costs around TWD 650. Delicious and affordable! The Miyazaki beef is juicy and has no strange odor.
translations.這次也在托運行李放 Airtag 追蹤行李位置，不怕行李遺失、等轉盤的時候也很方: This time, I also placed an Airtag in my checked luggage to track its location, so I’m not worried about losing my bags. It’s also very convenient when waiting at the carousel.
translations.這次住到雷：\n日本找飯店也還是要看評價，最好直接看低分評價的內容，看能不能接受:
This time, the accommodation was disappointing:  
When booking hotels in Japan, it's important to check reviews carefully. It's best to read the low-rated reviews to see if you can accept the issues mentioned. Also, use street view to check the actual surroundings and accessibility.
translations.這次依然狂走景點，應該放慢腳步慢慢享受當下跟尋找美食；尤其日本過吃飯時間就沒有有: This time, I still rushed through the sights. I should have slowed down to enjoy the moment and find good food; especially in Japan, famous restaurants are often closed outside meal times.
translations.這次熊本排太多天，應該 2 天就好，其他天可以去大分；而且福岡熊本其實比福岡長崎:
This time, I spent too many days in Kumamoto—2 days would have been enough. The extra days could have been spent in Oita. Also, Fukuoka is actually much closer to Kumamoto than to Nagasaki.

In the past, I would find accommodation first and then look for attractions. Since Kyushu is vast, it's better to choose the places you want to visit first and then arrange accommodation. This way, you can visit more attractions.
translations.這次錯過了由布院的祭典(那天我跑去長崎)：\n之後可以查查去的日期有沒有祭典，大:
This time I missed the Yufuin festival (I went to Nagasaki that day):  
Next time, check if there is a festival on your travel dates. Everyone recommends the festival; it’s a must-visit.
translations.這邊也會有熊本熊表演，要參考公告時間。\n\n: There will also be Kumamon performances here; please refer to the announced schedule.
translations.這邊可以從後方看到熊本城。\n\n: You can see Kumamoto Castle from the back here.
translations.這邊沒有公車直達，都要走一小段(約 15 分鐘)；離開神社後繼續往「熊本動物園」: There is no direct bus here, so you need to walk a short distance (about 15 minutes); after leaving the shrine, continue walking toward "Kumamoto Zoo" (about 20–30 minutes) to find the Chopper statue.
translations.這邊要逛也很多可以逛，也有 Jump Shop。\n\n: There are many places to shop here, including a Jump Shop.
translations.這間飯店唯一優點，出來對面就有機場交通車。\n\n: The only advantage of this hotel is that the airport shuttle stops right across the street.
translations.通往神社的橋如果是晚上＋人少應該蠻好拍的，人太多隨手亂拍。\n\n: The bridge leading to the shrine is great for photos at night with few people around. When there are too many people, shots tend to be random.
translations.遇到其他飛機跑錯跑道，整個機場 Reset；飛機繞了一大圈才起飛，大概 Dela: Encountered another plane on the wrong runway, causing the entire airport to reset; the plane circled for a long time before takeoff, resulting in nearly a 30-minute delay; sat on an old plane with a very small screen.
translations.過橋的時候船夫會請大家低頭防止撞到，蠻有趣的；路途上遮陰不多，有點曬。\n\n: When crossing the bridge, the boatman asks everyone to lower their heads to avoid hitting anything, which is quite interesting; there is little shade along the way, so it can get a bit sunny.
translations.選擇出發、到達站 (用英文站名搜尋)\n: Select Departure and Arrival Stations (Search by English Station Name)
translations.還能在異地跟熟悉的人吃飯太感動了，畢竟我也自閉了好幾天(不懂日文、幾乎不講話)，: It was so touching to have a meal with familiar people while away from home. After all, I had been quite withdrawn for several days (not understanding Japanese and barely speaking). In the end, I even received a souvenir from Beppu 😭.
translations.那時候可能真的累了，後來才知道其實有觀景平台可以看飛機，掛完行李之後其實可以去逛: I was probably really tired at the time. Later, I found out there is actually an observation deck to watch planes. After checking in luggage, you can take a walk there without rushing to go through immigration.
translations.都逛完之後開始慢慢走回程，本來想說搭乘 15:47 的 JR 回熊本，但走回宮地: After finishing all the sightseeing, I started walking back slowly. I originally planned to take the 15:47 JR train back to Kumamoto, but when I got to Miyaji Station, I found out that train was all reserved seating, with no unreserved seats available, and it was fully sold out, so I couldn't board.
translations.酒足飯飽後，早早睡去；準備迎接最後一天的熊本(扣掉回程飛機那天)。\n\n: After a satisfying meal, I went to bed early, ready to迎接 the final day in Kumamoto (excluding the return flight day).
translations.門司到小倉很近，但小倉是小站，出站一片荒蕪，找小倉的入口還走錯繞了一大圈，其實入: Mojiko is very close to Kokura, but Kokura is a small station. The area outside the station is quite deserted. I even took a long detour trying to find the entrance to Kokura, but it’s actually right outside the mall on the other side of Kokura.
translations.門票有：熊本城 800、熊本城+買票後面那棟(歷史文化體驗 湧湧座) 850、熊: Tickets available: Kumamoto Castle 800, Kumamoto Castle + the building behind it (Historical and Cultural Experience Yuyuza) 850, Kumamoto Castle + the building behind it (Historical and Cultural Experience Yuyuza) + Kumamoto Museum 1,100.
translations.阿蘇另外有直升機體驗行程，直接坐直升機看火山，有興趣的人可以查查。\n\n: There is also a helicopter tour at Aso, where you can see the volcano from the air. Those interested can look it up.
translations.阿蘇熊本機場(KMJ) 很新很小，班次也不多；國際線今天就三班而已，國際線只有三: Aso Kumamoto Airport (KMJ) is very new and small, with limited flights; there are only three international flights today, and the international terminal has just three counters, all shared in rotation.
translations.阿蘇站只有一個月台，直接無腦上車即可；後來發現如果時間真的來不及買票，也可以直接: Aso Station has only one platform, so you can just board the train without thinking. Later, I found that if you're really short on time to buy a ticket, you can board first and pay when exiting.
translations.附上時刻表，或請先查好時刻；不然就會像我們一樣只能等一小時，等下一班 16:35: Attach the timetable, or please check the schedule in advance; otherwise, like us, you might have to wait an hour for the next local JR train back to Kumamoto at 16:35.
translations.隔音不好應該是老舊飯店的通病，這個我還能忍(自備耳塞)；但是飯店的 WiFi 如: Poor soundproofing seems to be a common issue with older hotels, which I can tolerate (brought my own earplugs); however, the hotel's WiFi, as previous reviews mentioned, is just a sham.
translations.隨便吃了很貴又普通的口水雞，順手看了一下行李位置；行李也跟隨我托運到機場了。\n: Randomly ate an expensive but ordinary mouth-watering chicken, and casually checked the luggage location; the luggage was also checked through to the airport with me.
translations.離開和平公園後先去客美多稍做休息，準備晚上去看 **世界三大夜景之一的稻佐山夜景: After leaving Peace Park, I stopped by Komeda for a short break, preparing for the evening to see **Mount Inasa night view, one of the world's top three night views.**
translations.頂樓有一隻熊本熊在揮手，二樓也有販賣熊本熊周邊( **我覺得是最齊全的** )。: On the rooftop, there is a Kumamon waving, and on the second floor, Kumamon merchandise is sold (**I think it’s the most complete collection**).
translations.順序沒有一定，但遊船有時間限制，下午 2 點之後就沒了；所以就直接照流程走，福岡: The order is flexible, but the boat tour has a time limit and ends after 2 PM. So we followed this route: Fukuoka -> Yanagawa -> Dazaifu -> Fukuoka.
translations.飯店小開箱，整體偏舊、燈光昏暗、隔音普普、冷氣稍微有聲音，但依然乾淨整潔；不過還: Hotel mini review: Overall, it feels a bit old, with dim lighting, average sound insulation, and the air conditioner makes some noise. However, it is still clean and tidy. I do regret not spending a bit more to stay at the nearby APA chain hotel.
translations.飯店訂好了，就可以填寫線上的 [預定入境申請](../76d66c2e34af/: Once the hotel is booked, you can fill out the online [Pre-Entry Application](../76d66c2e34af/).
translations.香露是店家推薦的熊本地酒，甜口的，喝起很順，但我覺得米味不夠。\n\n: Kouro is the store's recommended local sake from Kumamoto. It has a sweet taste and goes down smoothly, but I think it lacks enough rice flavor.
translations.鳥瞰熊本城前方廣場與後方持續維修中的古蹟。\n\n: Aerial view of the plaza in front of Kumamoto Castle and the historic site under ongoing repairs behind it.
